## What's Changed

- Added a dedicated Tater section before Processing with Core pairing, connection status, viewing context, and active recommendations.
- Added six-digit PIN pairing and scoped credentials for Tater Tube Core.
- Added normalized player viewing events and durable household viewing history.
- Added AI recommendation candidate, publishing, feedback, and player delivery APIs.
- Added launch-safe local movie and series recommendations without exposing player credentials to Tater Core.
- Added SQLite and PostgreSQL migrations plus lifecycle coverage for pairing, history, recommendations, and feedback.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Database migration 035 runs automatically. Pair Tater Tube Core from Configuration → Tater after upgrading.
